examples: And in the lumberyard lay the third three, in a pile of wood, not made into anything.
The third tree was confused when the woodcutter cut her into strong beams and left her in a lumberyard.
After starving as a barber during the Depression2, my father traded his straight razor3 for a bench saw at the local lumberyard.
So it's a lot dryer than what you can even buy at the lumberyard.
You can make your own plank with wood from a lumberyard, but it must be untreated wood.
